body:
Beacon Brand Guidelines

Master reference for the Beacon Retail Group identity system. Covers logo usage, clear space, color, and typography. Maintained with input from the external design vendor (Laura Creates Studio).

  • Primary palette: Beacon Slate, Signal Amber, Paper White
  • Typeface pairing: Sohne for headlines, Source Serif for body
  • Logo lockups and minimum sizes
title: Beacon Brand Guidelines

body:
Logo & Wordmark Usage

Approved logo variants, spacing rules, and incorrect-usage examples. Laura delivered the refreshed wordmark and ampersand mark for the spring identity update.

  • Full lockup, stacked, and icon-only variants
  • Do-not list: distortion, recoloring, drop shadows
  • Minimum clear space equals the height of the mark
title: Logo and Wordmark Usage

body:
Typography System

Type scale, weights, and pairing rules for print and web. Custom hand-lettering accents are reserved for hero campaign moments only.

  • Headline scale: 48 / 36 / 28 / 22
  • Body: 16 with 1.5 line height
  • Lettering accents approved by the brand team
title: Typography System

body:
Color Palette & Accessibility

Core and extended palettes with contrast ratios for WCAG AA. Includes hex, RGB, and CMYK values for each swatch.

  • Beacon Slate on Paper White passes AA for body text
  • Signal Amber reserved for accents and calls to action
  • Contrast checked against the campaign landing layouts
title: Color Palette and Accessibility

body:
Spring Refresh Campaign Brief

Objectives, audience, channels, and deliverables for the spring brand refresh. Creative direction handled with Laura Creates Studio.

  • Goal: lift in-store foot traffic and email signups
  • Channels: email, in-store signage, paid social
  • Key visual: ampersand motif carried across touchpoints
title: Spring Refresh Campaign Brief

body:
Vendor Onboarding Checklist

Steps to bring an external design vendor into the Beacon workspace, including access, asset handoff, and review cadence.

  • Grant Confluence and Box guest access
  • Share brand source files and font licenses
  • Set weekly review with the marketing team
title: Vendor Onboarding Checklist

body:
Asset Handoff Notes

Naming conventions, export settings, and file structure for delivered brand assets. Laura provides packaged source files plus flattened exports.

  • Source: layered Figma and AI files
  • Exports: SVG, PNG at 1x and 2x, print-ready PDF
  • Folder structure mirrors the Box vendor space
title: Asset Handoff Notes

body:
Q1 Marketing Roadmap

One-page view of marketing priorities and creative milestones for the quarter, with the brand refresh as the anchor initiative.

  • Finalize brand guidelines
  • Ship spring campaign creative
  • Refresh in-store signage templates
title: Q1 Marketing Roadmap
